title: Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office consular data 2024
body: "The Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office publishes consular data on assistance provided to British nationals around the world. This data is published monthly.   As part of a wider digital change programme, the Foreign Commonwealth and Development Office introduced a new case management system on 16 October 2023. The new system captures information about services provided in a different way to legacy systems. As a result of this work, we have  re-categorised the assistance service categories reported.   Data is accurate and volumes of services are correct at time of reporting. Consular service volumes are dynamic and historic cases can change previously-published service volumes. "
